## Summary / Суть

Describe the change and the reason for it.
Опиши изменение и зачем оно нужно.

## Testing / Проверка

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Docs updated if needed

## Notes / Примечания

Call out deployment impact, migrations, security changes, or follow-up work.
